STATUS

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0xc
Size:
0x4
Source:
pl_control.rdl

Description

PL status bits.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:3] - - - -
[2] consumer_error r 0x0 -
[1] overflow r 0x0 -
[0] ready r 0x1 -

Field Descriptions

consumer_error

WS281x consumer detected an error.

overflow

Last commit exceeded bank capacity.

ready

Control block is ready.
